chapter_title.en: The Times When Purification is an Obligation

text: أَبُو جَعْفَرٍ اَلْبَاقِرُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «إِذَا دَخَلَ اَلْوَقْتُ وَجَبَ اَلطَّهُورُ وَ اَلصَّلاَةُ وَ لاَ صَلاَةَ إِلاَّ بِطَهُورٍ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.67 - Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Baqir (as) said:
"When the time for prayer enters, purification (ablution) and the prayer become obligatory, and there is no prayer without purification."
